zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Babington於1376年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾時，他的父親John de Babington IV43歲，母親Benidicta de La Warde39歲。他於1422年與Isabel De Thick在英國德比夏爾德比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1464年1月4日在英國德比夏爾阿福享年88歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾阿福哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Babington于1376年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾时，他的父亲John de Babington IV43岁，母亲Benidicta de La Warde39岁。他于1422年与Isabel De Thick在英国德比夏爾德比结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1464年1月4日在英国德比夏爾阿福享年88岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾阿福哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Babington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name for someone from Babington in Somerset or Great or Little Bavington in Northumberland, which is recorded as Babington until the early 18th century. Both are named with the Old English personal name Babba (see Babb ) + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The name may also be derived from Bebington in Cheshire (see 2 below) or Bevington in Warwickshire (see Bevington , which has sometimes been altered in spelling by association with Babington).

English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of Bebbington, a habitational name from Bebington in Cheshire, from the Old English personal name Bebba + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The alteration to Bavington and Bevington shows a common development of -b- to -v- in placenames and surnames.

variants.name: Babb
meanings: English (Devon, Somerset, and Cornwall): from the Middle English personal name Babb(e), usually no doubt a pet form of the female personal name Barbara (see Barbara ), but possibly in some cases a survival of the Old English personal name Babba, which is found in several placenames, including Babbacombe in Devon and Babington in Somerset.
English (Devon, Somerset, and Cornwall): from Middle English babe ‘infant, young child’, applied as a nickname.
Americanized form of German   Bobb   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Bevington
meanings: (southwest Midlands): habitational name from either of two places, in Warwickshire and Gloucestershire, named Bevington, from the Old English personal name Bēofa + Old English -ing- implying association + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Babington was born in 1376, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Babington IV, was 43 and his mother, Benidicta de La Warde, was 39. He married Isabel De Thick in 1422, in Derby, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 4 January 1464, in Ashover, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 88, and was buried in All Saints' Church, Ashover, Derbyshire, England.

Il a épousé Isabel De Thick en 1422, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 4 janvier 1464, à Ashover, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterré à All Saints' Church, Ashover, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Babingtonが1376年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Babington IVは43歳，母Benidicta de La Wardeは39歳であった。1422年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーでIsabel De Thickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1464年1月4日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアショバーで88歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアアショバーアル サイントス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints' Church, Ashover, Derbyshire,: 영국 더비실르 애쇼버 앨 세인츠' 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Babington(이)가 1376년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Babington IV(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Benidicta de La Warde(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1422년 영국 더비실르 더비에서 Isabel De Thick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1464년 1월 4일 영국 더비실르 애쇼버에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 애쇼버 앨 세인츠' 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Babington nasceu em 1376, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Babington IV, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Benidicta de La Warde, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel De Thick em 1422, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de janeiro de 1464, em Ashover, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 88 anos, e foi sepultado em All Saints' Church, Ashover, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.All Saints' Church, Ashover, Derbyshire,: алл сеинц' чурч, ашовир, дирбишир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Babington родился в 1376 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Babington IV было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Benidicta de La Warde, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel De Thick в 1422 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 4 января 1464 г. в местности ашовир, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 88 лет и был похоронен в местности алл сеинц' чурч, ашовир, дирбишир, Англия.

Se casó con Isabel De Thick en 1422, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 4 de enero de 1464, en Ashover, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultado en All Saints' Church, Ashover, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
